question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not mention any chapters or sections of the thesis. It only describes the problem statement and the proposed solution.

question: Description
feedback: The text does not describe the contents of any thesis sections; it focuses entirely on the research problem and the objective of the prototype development.

question: Structure
feedback: The general structure of the thesis is not visible. The text is repetitive (the first paragraph and second paragraph repeat much of the same information) and lacks a roadmap of how the research will be presented.
